Off Calendar Oct-15-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANTS BRUCE RATLIFF, KIM MILLER, ACTION PROPERTY MANAGEMENT, INC.'S Motion For Leave To File 1st Amended Answer To Plaintiff's Complaint is granted. Plaintiff has not established that allowing this amendment will result in prejudice, and the Court has discretion under Cal. Code Civ. Proc., section 473(a)(1) to grant leave to amend. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) Judge: Leslie C. Nichols; Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Court Reporter: Anthony Vaughn, CSR #6185
